title: thunderbird security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[140.3.0-1.0.1]
- Add Oracle prefs

[140.3.0]
- Add OpenELA debranding

[140.3.0-1]
- Update to 140.3.0 ESR
